task.summary: Pfade auf absolute Links aktualisieren und Metadaten ergänzen
Pfade auf absolute Links aktualisieren und Metadaten ergänzen
Pfade auf absolute Links aktualisieren und Metadaten ergänzen

Vanilla SMP Rules and Combat Guidelines
- Replaced placeholder content with a comprehensive set of rules for the Vanilla SMP. - Defined combat regulations, including a 3-minute combat timer, 10-minute re-engagement cooldown, and bans on Crystal PvP, Elytras, and Riptide tridents during fights. - Restricted specific items like Slow Falling and Weakness effects in combat and danger zones. - Set world boundaries and base requirements, including an 8,000-block limit from spawn and a ban on inaccessible bases. - Outlined fair play policies regarding griefing, kill farming, and bounty/economy exploitation. - Established that these rules supplement the existing Buffed Network Rules.

Vanilla SMP Rules and Combat Guidelines
- Replaced placeholder content with a comprehensive set of rules for the Vanilla SMP. - Defined combat regulations, including a 3-minute combat timer, 10-minute re-engagement cooldown, and bans on Crystal PvP, Elytras, and Riptide tridents during fights. - Restricted specific items like Slow Falling and Weakness effects in combat and danger zones. - Set world boundaries and base requirements, including an 8,000-block limit from spawn and a ban on inaccessible bases. - Outlined fair play policies regarding griefing, kill farming, and bounty/economy exploitation. - Established that these rules supplement the existing Buffed Network Rules.

Vanilla Changes Documentation & Sidebar Update
- Created `vanilla-changes.md` to provide a comprehensive overview of all gameplay modifications on the Vanilla SMP. - Documented mechanical changes for Enderpearls, Tridents, and the extended day-night cycle. - Listed item damage immunities for explosions, fire, and lava, as well as custom crafting recipes for Golden Apples and Cobwebs. - Detailed specific potion buffs, farmland protection with Feather Falling, and player head drops. - Included a thorough breakdown of modified Ominous Vault loot tables, specifically noting the increased rarity of the Heavy Core and adjusted weights for Rare and Unique pools. - Added the new page to the vanilla sidebar for easier navigation.

Vanilla SMP Join Instructions & Launch Details
- Added launch date (June 26, 2026) and server IP address. - Clarified that the server is public and requires no application or whitelist. - Outlined joining steps and the optional Discord verification process for bonus Sparks. - Updated technical requirements, including the target Paper version and a restriction on ViaVersion clients. - Linked to network and server-specific rules for better visibility.

Update Vanilla Changes documentation and IDE workspace
- Restructured the Endermite spawn chance section in vanilla-changes.md into a table for better readability. - Added clarifying text regarding the Enderpearl speed cap. - Updated IntelliJ IDEA workspace configuration to reflect recent file changes and version control settings.

Update Vanilla Changes documentation and IDE workspace
- Restructured the Endermite spawn chance section in vanilla-changes.md into a table for better readability. - Added clarifying text regarding the Enderpearl speed cap. - Updated IntelliJ IDEA workspace configuration to reflect recent file changes and version control settings.

Fix image paths in documentation files
- Updated image links in buffsmp/recipes.md and vanilla/vanilla-changes.md to use relative paths. - Ensures images resolve correctly from subdirectories by referencing the parent directory.

Vanilla SMP README Update & Feature Overview
- Updated launch date to June 26, 2026, and added the server IP address. - Refined the server description to reflect a "vanilla with adjustments" approach rather than pure vanilla. - Added a comprehensive section detailing custom features: Sparks (currency), Orbital Strikes, Buffies (QoL boosts), LootDrops, Login-Streaks, and Supporter Ranks. - Updated technical requirements to Paper 26.2. - Improved navigation links and getting started instructions.

MESSAGE.value: Pfade auf absolute Links aktualisieren und Metadaten ergänzen

Vanilla SMP Rules and Combat Guidelines
- Replaced placeholder content with a comprehensive set of rules for the Vanilla SMP. - Defined combat regulations, including a 3-minute combat timer, 10-minute re-engagement cooldown, and bans on Crystal PvP, Elytras, and Riptide tridents during fights. - Restricted specific items like Slow Falling and Weakness effects in combat and danger zones. - Set world boundaries and base requirements, including an 8,000-block limit from spawn and a ban on inaccessible bases. - Outlined fair play policies regarding griefing, kill farming, and bounty/economy exploitation. - Established that these rules supplement the existing Buffed Network Rules.

Vanilla Changes Documentation & Sidebar Update
- Created `vanilla-changes.md` to provide a comprehensive overview of all gameplay modifications on the Vanilla SMP. - Documented mechanical changes for Enderpearls, Tridents, and the extended day-night cycle. - Listed item damage immunities for explosions, fire, and lava, as well as custom crafting recipes for Golden Apples and Cobwebs. - Detailed specific potion buffs, farmland protection with Feather Falling, and player head drops. - Included a thorough breakdown of modified Ominous Vault loot tables, specifically noting the increased rarity of the Heavy Core and adjusted weights for Rare and Unique pools. - Added the new page to the vanilla sidebar for easier navigation.

Vanilla SMP Join Instructions & Launch Details
- Added launch date (June 26, 2026) and server IP address. - Clarified that the server is public and requires no application or whitelist. - Outlined joining steps and the optional Discord verification process for bonus Sparks. - Updated technical requirements, including the target Paper version and a restriction on ViaVersion clients. - Linked to network and server-specific rules for better visibility.

Update Vanilla Changes documentation and IDE workspace
- Restructured the Endermite spawn chance section in vanilla-changes.md into a table for better readability. - Added clarifying text regarding the Enderpearl speed cap. - Updated IntelliJ IDEA workspace configuration to reflect recent file changes and version control settings.

Fix image paths in documentation files
- Updated image links in buffsmp/recipes.md and vanilla/vanilla-changes.md to use relative paths. - Ensures images resolve correctly from subdirectories by referencing the parent directory.

Vanilla SMP README Update & Feature Overview
- Updated launch date to June 26, 2026, and added the server IP address. - Refined the server description to reflect a "vanilla with adjustments" approach rather than pure vanilla. - Added a comprehensive section detailing custom features: Sparks (currency), Orbital Strikes, Buffies (QoL boosts), LootDrops, Login-Streaks, and Supporter Ranks. - Updated technical requirements to Paper 26.2. - Improved navigation links and getting started instructions.
